videos.title: You've Heard of Hate-Bears but What about Hate-Spiders?
videos.description:
On this week's episode of WHAT IF?... What if hate-bears were actually hate-spiders? We've even got the Anti-Venom/Verilax "combo" in With Great Power/Chosen by Valgavoth!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/single-scoop-you-ve-heard-of-hate-bears-but-what-about-hate-spiders
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7358794#paper
